response.title: Senior Financial Analyst
response.description: Global Finance Solutions Inc. is seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Senior Financial Analyst to join our finance team. The ideal candidate will be responsible for providing in-depth financial analysis, preparing reports, and assisting in strategic planning to support the company's financial objectives. This position requires a thorough understanding of finance principles and the ability to communicate complex financial information effectively to stakeholders.

required_skills: Expertise in financial modeling and forecasting techniques
Proficient in data analysis and financial reporting using Excel and Tableau
Strong understanding of GAAP and IFRS accounting standards
Experience with ERP systems, preferably SAP or Oracle
Ability to conduct variance analysis and budget forecasting
Advanced proficiency in SQL for data querying and analysis
Knowledge of financial risk management principles
Proven track record of presenting financial data to senior management
preferred_skills: Experience with financial compliance and regulatory standards
Familiarity with investment analysis and portfolio management
Certifications such as CFA or CPA
Experience in mergers and acquisitions (M&A) analysis
requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Finance, Accounting, or related field; Master's degree or MBA preferred
